prompt: Write an application letter for a part-time teaching assistant position.
text:
Dear Ms Taylor,

I am writing to apply for the part-time teaching assistant position at your language centre. I believe I am suitable for this position because I have relevant experience in helping younger students practise English after school.

During the last year, I worked as a volunteer tutor, so I became familiar with preparing simple exercises and supporting learners who needed extra help. In addition, I am patient, responsible and able to communicate clearly with students. If I am given the opportunity, I will prepare carefully for every lesson.

Please find my CV attached for further information. I am available for an interview next week and would be grateful for the opportunity to discuss my application.

Yours sincerely,
Nghia
